subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Thy mention hath been made in the presence of the Wronged One. We make mention of thee in this mighty Tablet which hath descended from heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قد ذکر ذکرک لدی المظلوم ذکرناک بهذا اللوح العظیم الذی نزل من سماء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
